summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine Trading Terminal Phase TT1 - Execution State & Orders Tab. Backend APIs working correctly with proper state machine validation. Frontend components displaying execution status properly. Orders Tab present but may have display integration issues.

state_machine_validation.issue: Correctly prevents illegal state transitions (e.g., FILLED -> ORDER_PLANNED)

integration_issues.issue: Orders Tab shows 'No orders yet' even when orders exist in backend

passed_tests: GET /api/terminal/execution/BTCUSDT - returns execution status with all required fields
GET /api/terminal/orders - returns orders list with correct structure
POST /api/terminal/orders/simulate-place - creates order from valid intent
State machine validation - prevents illegal transitions correctly
ExecutionStatusBlock displays in UI with correct status
Execution Block with Execute Trade button present
Orders Tab component present in UI
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Orders Tab integration - orders exist in backend but not displaying in frontend Orders Tab. The tab shows 'No orders yet' even when GET /api/terminal/orders returns 2 orders. Check orders_preview integration in terminal state.
